task_summaries.task_scope: Analyze class-conditioned distribution profiles and entropy measures for the Destination Port feature to identify representational skew and variability.
Investigate the prevalence and role of the dominant destination port in the DDoS traffic subset to distinguish targeted attack vectors from dataset artifacts.
Assess potential dataset biases or artifacts influencing the Destination Port distribution to identify structural irregularities affecting representational validity.
Consider effects of skew in Destination Port distribution on generalization to other attack types or ports by verifying local label-topology consistency and potential shortcut signals.
